name_extraction.en: What is the name shown on the ID card? Return only the answer.
name_extraction.zh: 身份证上显示的姓名是什么？只返回答案。

id_number_extraction.en: What is the ID number shown on the ID card? Return only the answer.
id_number_extraction.zh: 身份证上显示的证件号码是什么？只返回答案。

cross_image_validation.en: Do these two images belong to the same person? Answer with exactly one label: yes or no.
cross_image_validation.zh: 这两张图像是否属于同一个人？仅回答 yes 或 no。

privacy_risk_reasoning.en: Based on the available images, does this profile reveal high privacy risk? Answer with exactly one label: low, medium, or high.
privacy_risk_reasoning.zh: 基于现有图像，这个资料是否暴露出高隐私风险？仅回答 low、medium 或 high。
